news.title: Um restaurante no céu de Lisboa: Sky Lounge eleva almoços e jantares a 50m de altura - Público
news.summary:
# Summary

Sky Lounge, a new rooftop restaurant in Lisbon, operates 50 meters above the city and offers dining experiences with panoramic views. The restaurant elevates both lunch and dinner service to a literal new height, providing a unique venue for meals with scenic vistas of Lisbon. Visitors to the city would appreciate this destination for its combination of elevated cuisine and spectacular city views.

news.title: Até 17 de abril, restaurantes libaneses em Lisboa apoiam deslocados de guerra no Médio Oriente - Expresso
news.summary:
# Summary

Until April 17th, Lebanese restaurants in Lisbon are participating in a charitable initiative to support displaced people from Middle East conflicts. While the article doesn't name specific restaurants, it highlights that these establishments are using their business to raise funds for humanitarian aid. Visitors to Lisbon can support this cause by dining at participating Lebanese restaurants during this period.

news.title: Após 10 anos, A-100 abre primeiro restaurante fora da Grande Lisboa este sábado - nit.pt
news.summary:
# Summary

After 10 years of operating exclusively in the Greater Lisbon area, the restaurant A-100 is opening its first location outside the region this Saturday. This expansion makes the restaurant accessible to visitors and residents in other parts of Portugal beyond Lisbon. If you're traveling outside Lisbon and enjoyed A-100's concept, you'll now have the opportunity to visit them in a new location.

news.title: Considerado "o melhor leitão de Portugal", este icónico restaurante da Bairrada instala-se em Lisboa durante 4 dias - Lisboa Secreta
news.summary:
# Summary

A renowned Bairrada restaurant famous for what's considered "Portugal's best roasted suckling pig" is opening a 4-day pop-up location in Lisbon. This is a great opportunity for Lisbon visitors to taste an iconic regional specialty without traveling to Bairrada, one of Portugal's most celebrated culinary destinations. Food enthusiasts and those seeking authentic Portuguese cuisine will want to check this limited-time dining experience.

news.title: Cartões bancários do gestor de restaurante de luxo raptado usados em Lisboa - regiao-sul.pt
news.summary:
# Summary

A luxury restaurant manager who was kidnapped had his bank cards used fraudulently in Lisbon. This incident highlights serious security concerns affecting the upscale dining scene in the region. Visitors to Lisbon should be aware of this crime and exercise caution, particularly around high-end establishments and financial security.
